title: AHZNB's Naruto Jutsu
body:
This is a library-type mod that adds new jutsu and provides them for Naruto Addons. The mod is required by most of DecentStudio Naruto Addons.


**Feel free to join DecentStudio Discord server for any questions, to stay updated or to order a mod/plugin:** https://discord.gg/MdFpAjPqpX
